pattern: A symbol smaller than the one after it is subtractive, so a single left-to-right pass that looks one symbol ahead suffices.
hints: Each letter has a fixed value; the only twist is that a few pairs encode subtraction.
Compare each symbol with the one immediately to its right - that alone tells you whether to add or subtract its value.
Walk left to right: if the current value is less than the next value, subtract it; otherwise add it.

stress.description: random valid numerals 1..3999 round-tripped from integers
stress.note: every generated string is a canonical Roman numeral
